ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ABDULRAZAK, ABDULRAZAK ABDULHAFIDH HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR CHANGE OF NAME. PETITIONER ABDULRAZAK ABDULHAFIDH ABDULRAZAK WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED THROUGH ARABIC INTERPRETER, MAHMOUD KADDOURA. THE COURT GRANTS DECREE CHANGING PETITIONER'S NAME TO NATALY KOSOREV ARNON. DECREE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH, #5162 (503)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for change of name.. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, #5162. Petitioner Abdulrazak Abdulhafidh Abdulrazak was sworn and examined through Arabic interpreter, Mahmoud Kaddoura. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Nataly Kosorev Arnon. Decree signed and filed in open court. (503)

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Name Change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler; Bailiff: R. Guitron. There being no appearance by the petitioner, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Calendar error - duplicate entry.
